title: BUILDING RESILIENCE - 211info
text: PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS BUILDING RESILIENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Skill-based support group for men who have experienced adversity, stress and trauma. Meals are provided and childcare is available. 7305 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Fathers involved with child welfare and/or the criminal justice system who have some form of contact with their children. This can include supervised visitation or regular phone contact. Hours: Classes are generally held weekly in the evenings Email (503) 892-5396 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 892-5396 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an intake or for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Domestic Violence Intervention Programs * Fathers * Ex-Offenders Domestic Violence Intervention Programs * Fathers * Inmates Parenting Skills Classes * Fathers * Ex-Offenders Parenting Skills Classes * Fathers * Inmates Other Services Offered At This Location: EARLY CHILDHOOD HOME VISITING PROGRAM - HOME VISITING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALING TRAUMA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INSIDE OUT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
